steps.title: Name the city's namesake
steps.content: The student wants to indicate how Fulton, Missouri, got its name. The relevant note says the city is named after Robert Fulton, and the steamboat detail can identify who Fulton was without replacing the naming explanation.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant details
steps.content: Choice A only says Fulton, Missouri, shares a name with Fulton Street. Choice B focuses on Fulton Street and New York City. Choice C describes only the Clermont, not the city's name. The answer is D.
